message:
Remove orphaned .lychee.toml (#352)

The legacy link checker workflow was removed in #340. No workflow
references .lychee.toml anymore — the repo uses centralized agentic
workflows from llm-d-infra for link checking.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-# Ignore transient failures on gnu.org (it sometimes refuses connections)
-exclude = [
-  "^https://www.gnu.org/software/make/?$"
-]
-
-# Timeout in seconds
-timeout = 20
-
-# Retry failed links (helpful for flaky sites)
-retry_count = 3
-
-# Accept non-200 status codes (429: rate limits)
-accept = [200, 429]
